name: Monster High - Everybody Turned Into Humans?
description: Monster High RP but everyone turned into humans... Somebody (*cough cough* Toralei Stripes-) snuck into the boogeyman mansion and found a sand that she thought was for turning people into slugs since she wanted to play a prank on the whole school but instead it was a sand to turn everyone into humans... she put dust in everyone's lockers so that everyone would turn into humans when they opened their lockers and she accidentally put it in her own as well. Have fun!
creator: HazelBazeled9010
